title: Extended: scope (v0.1)
description: Audience-neutral description of what the Pack covers — the boundary of the attestation. Carried under the Pack envelope's 'extended.scope' field. Other attestation claims in the Pack (e.g. controlAttestations) apply to the scope defined here.

description.description: Human-readable description of the boundary. Required when scope is present so that auditors have a textual statement of what is being attested about. The structured fields below (timeWindow, environments, runs) supplement but do not replace this.

end.description: End of the time window (inclusive). MAY be omitted for ongoing scopes ('from start onwards').

timeWindow.description: Time boundary of the scope. SHOULD be present for time-bounded attestations.

environments.description: Environment identifiers covered by the attestation (e.g. 'production', 'staging', or implementer-defined URIs). MAY be omitted when scope is not environment-bounded.

runs.description: Specific runIds covered by the attestation. Useful for run-aggregated Packs that explicitly enumerate which runs are in scope. Distinct from core.events: these are runId references, not event references.
